response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS — aligning with core requirements — but his resume overstates seniority, lacks clear evidence of PostgreSQL or Nest.js, and shows no German language proficiency despite high on-site requirements in Berlin. His focus on niche tools like DLang and open-source projects, while impressive, may not translate directly to the renewable energy platform’s pragmatic, team-oriented workflow.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack experience across React, Node.js, and AWS
Proven ability to build scalable systems and integrate diverse data sources
Active contributor to open-source tools and developer education
concerns: No explicit experience with PostgreSQL or Nest.js as required
German language skill is only basic, but role requires high on-site presence in Berlin
Resume inflates seniority (e.g., 'Staff Software Engineer' at 2025 start date) and lacks clear timeline consistency
